StructureVector_t
]


Heads and decision rules
PreFilter_t = 1 if SignalStackGate_t = 1 and LocationPass_t = 1 else 0


alphaRaw_t = wAlpha^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t
execRaw_t = 1 / (1 + exp(-wExec^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t))
risk_t = wRisk^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t


alpha_t = PreFilter_t * alphaRaw_t
exec_t = PreFilter_t * execRaw_t


ExecPass_t = 1 if VPIN_t < thetaVPIN and Resil_t > thetaResil and SpreadShock_t < thetaSpreadShock and abs(Slippage_t) < thetaSlippage and DepthFade_t < thetaDepthFade else 0
RiskPass_t = 1 if risk_t < thetaRisk else 0


TradeGate_t = 1 if PreFilter_t = 1 and alphaRaw_t > thetaAlpha and ExecPass_t = 1 and RiskPass_t = 1 else 0


size_t = sizeMax * f(alphaRaw_t) * g(risk_t) * h(execRaw_t)


Implementation rules
Compute all raw formulas first, then normalize, then run category selection, then run category pass logic, then run SignalStackGate_t and LocationPass_t, then assemble the final vector, then evaluate alpha, execution, risk, and TradeGate_t.
Do not merge DOM, Order Flow, OBI, and OFI into one raw variable.
Do not discard non-selected category signals; store them in RawSignalBank_t.
Allow config to switch category selection between fixed and dynamic modes.
Allow config to switch Institutional selection between anti-echo subfamily mode and direct full-category mode.
Allow config to map any candidate to any category only if explicitly configured; otherwise use the default category membership above.
For FX/XAUUSD, use venue-aware aggregation for DOM, OBI, order flow, and internalisation proxies.
For futures, equities, and crypto, use direct centralized-book logic when available.
Keep Market/Institutional Structures always-on in FinalIntegratedStateVector_t even though the selector only chooses one active signal from each of Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility.
Preserve every formula above exactly, including RawSignalBank_t, selector logic, pass logic, hard location gate, and final vector assembly.


Implement the full RawSignalBank_t, category selector, category pass stack, hard location gate, and FinalIntegratedStateVector_t exactly as specified above.

Goal: Create a Codex-ready implementation prompt that computes the full raw signal inventory, groups signals into Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility categories, selects exactly one active signal per category, converts selected category signals into a true signal-stack with category pass/fail states, applies a hard location gate from Market/Institutional Structures, and preserves every signal and formula from the previous spec while keeping one signal per category in the active decision layer. Context: For FOREX and XAUUSD, assume OTC venue fragmentation. DOM, Order Flow, OBI, OFI, and execution observability must be venue-local or venue-aggregated, not fictional global consolidated feeds. U.S. ATS and off-exchange transparency is delayed. Use Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov style OFI and depth-impact structure. Use standard TA-Lib-style RSI, MACD, ADX, ATR, StochRSI, EMA, and Bollinger definitions. The architecture must avoid indicator echo by selecting one active signal from each category, then combining those selected category signals with always-on Market/Institutional Structures for the FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t. The selected category signals must feed a mandatory SignalStackGate\_t and a mandatory LocationPass\_t before alpha, execution, and risk routing. Constraints: Preserve every formula below exactly. Add explicit grouping for Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility. Add explicit EMA, ATR, and Bollinger formulas and category membership. Compute all raw signals even if only one signal per category is selected. Do not require every signal in a category to be true at the same time. Use one of two selection modes: SelectionMode = "fixed" or SelectionMode = "dynamic" In fixed mode, the active category signal is chosen from config. In dynamic mode, score\_{j,t} = valid\_{j,t} \* abs(z(x\_{j,t})) \* w\_j, sel(c,t) = argmax\_{j in G\_c} score\_{j,t}, CatSignal\_{c,t} = x\_{sel(c,t),t} If no candidate in category c is valid, CatSignal\_{c,t} = 0 and CategoryActive\_{c,t} = 0 Keep DOM, Order Flow, OBI, and OFI as distinct raw signals even if only one Institutional candidate is active. Keep raw VPIN\_t, Resil\_t, SpreadShock\_t, Slippage\_t, DepthFade\_t, and InternalisationProxy\_t available for hard execution and risk vetoes even if they are not the selected Institutional signal. Base market variables are always computed and always available. Market/Institutional Structures are always computed and always appended to the active state vector. Correlation and dark-pool/internalisation proxies must be computed and stored; they may be appended to an auxiliary context vector or used by config. Use z(x\_t) = (x\_t - mean(x)) / (stdev(x) + eps) for normalization. Use venue-aware aggregation for FX/XAUUSD and direct centralized-book logic for futures, equities, and crypto when available. Do not omit, merge, or rename any formula-defined feature. Do not use TrendSlope\_t as both a default Trend candidate and a default Structure feature; keep it computed in RawSignalBank\_t and use it in StructureVector\_t by default. By default, use anti-echo subfamily selection inside the Institutional category so one Institutional signal is still selected overall, but the category does not become its own echo chamber. The decision stack must be: RawSignalBank\_t -> CategorySelectedVector\_t -> CategoryPassVector\_t -> SignalStackGate\_t -> LocationPass\_t -> FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t -> alpha\_t, exec\_t, risk\_t -> TradeGate\_t Formula assumptions: Use OFI and depth-impact structure consistent with Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov order-book event modeling, with OFI linearly linked to short-horizon price changes and the slope inversely related to depth. Use standard TA-Lib-style RSI, MACD, ADX, ATR, EMA, StochRSI, and Bollinger definitions. Use helper identities where needed: Depth\_t = DOMTot\_t^(K) or the venue-aggregated equivalent DeltaCVD\_t = CVD\_t - CVD\_{t-1} VWAP\_t = VWAP\_\[sessionStart,t\] TWAP\_t = TWAP\_\[sessionStart,t\] For Direction mapping: Dir\_t in {-1, +1} For signed continuous signals, DirMap(x\_t) = sign(x\_t) For RSI, DirMap(RSI\_t) = 1 if RSI\_t > 50 + bandRSI, -1 if RSI\_t < 50 - bandRSI, else 0 For StochRSI, DirMap(StochRSI\_t) = 1 if StochRSI\_t > 50 + bandStoch, -1 if StochRSI\_t < 50 - bandStoch, else 0 For ADX, DirMap(ADX\_t) = sign(PlusDI\_t - MinusDI\_t) if ADX\_t >= thADX, else 0 For VAState\_t and TPOState\_t, DirMap(x\_t) = x\_t For volatility candidates, use RegimeMap(x\_t) rather than directional sign: RegimeMap(ATR\_t) = 1 if ATR\_t in \[thATRMin, thATRMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(BBWidth\_t) = 1 if BBWidth\_t in \[thBBWidthMin, thBBWidthMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(RV\_t) = 1 if RV\_t in \[thRVMin, thRVMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(BV\_t) = 1 if BV\_t in \[thBVMin, thBVMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(Jump\_t) = 1 if Jump\_t <= thJumpMax, else 0 RegimeMap(sigmaP\_t) = 1 if sigmaP\_t in \[thSigmaPMin, thSigmaPMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(sigmaGK\_t) = 1 if sigmaGK\_t in \[thSigmaGKMin, thSigmaGKMax\], else 0 RegimeMap(BBPos\_t) = 1 if BBWidth\_t in \[thBBWidthMin, thBBWidthMax\], else 0 Required output: Build seven layers: 1. RawSignalBank\_t 2. CategorySelectedVector\_t 3. CategoryPassVector\_t 4. SignalStackGate\_t 5. LocationPass\_t 6. FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t 7. alpha\_t, exec\_t, risk\_t, TradeGate\_t 8. Base market variables bid\_t = best bid ask\_t = best ask spread\_t = ask\_t - bid\_t mid\_t = (ask\_t + bid\_t) / 2 relSpread\_t = (ask\_t - bid\_t) / (mid\_t + eps) bidSize\_t = best bid size askSize\_t = best ask size micro\_t = (ask\_t \* bidSize\_t + bid\_t \* askSize\_t) / (bidSize\_t + askSize\_t + eps) If venue aggregated: midAgg\_t = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* mid\_{t,v} spreadAgg\_t = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* spread\_{t,v} sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v = 1 2. Institutional raw signal bank Institutional raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes InstSel\_t in CategorySelectedVector\_t. All raw Institutional signals remain available in RawSignalBank\_t. 2.1 Order Books and explicit Depth of Market DOMBid\_t^(K) = sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* B\_{k,t} DOMAsk\_t^(K) = sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* A\_{k,t} DOMTot\_t^(K) = DOMBid\_t^(K) + DOMAsk\_t^(K) DOMSkew\_t^(K) = (DOMBid\_t^(K) - DOMAsk\_t^(K)) / (DOMBid\_t^(K) + DOMAsk\_t^(K) + eps) DOMPressure\_t^(K) = sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* (B\_{k,t} - A\_{k,t}) Use w\_k = exp(-alphaDepth \* (k - 1)) or another monotone decay. If OTC venue aggregated: DOMBidAgg\_t^(K) = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* DOMBid\_{t,v}^(K) DOMAskAgg\_t^(K) = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* DOMAsk\_{t,v}^(K) DOMSkewAgg\_t^(K) = (DOMBidAgg\_t^(K) - DOMAskAgg\_t^(K)) / (DOMBidAgg\_t^(K) + DOMAskAgg\_t^(K) + eps) 2.2 Explicit Order Flow eps\_i in {-1, +1} flow\_i = eps\_i \* vol\_i BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] = sum\_{i in \[t-h,t\]} I(eps\_i = +1) \* vol\_i SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\] = sum\_{i in \[t-h,t\]} I(eps\_i = -1) \* vol\_i NetFlow\_\[t-h,t\] = BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] - SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\] FlowImb\_\[t-h,t\] = (BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] - SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\]) / (BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] + SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\] + eps) SignedFlow\_\[t-h,t\] = sum\_{i in \[t-h,t\]} eps\_i \* vol\_i CVD\_t = CVD\_{t-1} + sum\_{i in (t-dt,t\]} eps\_i \* vol\_i DeltaCVD\_t = CVD\_t - CVD\_{t-1} 2.3 Order Book Imbalance, explicit OBI OBI\_t^(1) = (bidSize\_t - askSize\_t) / (bidSize\_t + askSize\_t + eps) OBI\_t^(K) = (sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* B\_{k,t} - sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* A\_{k,t}) / (sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* B\_{k,t} + sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* A\_{k,t} + eps) If OTC venue aggregated: OBIAgg\_t^(K) = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* OBI\_{t,v}^(K) Keep the alias explicit: OBI\_t^(1) = DOMSkew\_t^(1) 2.4 Event-based OFI e\_n = I(P\_n^B >= P\_{n-1}^B) \* q\_n^B - I(P\_n^B <= P\_{n-1}^B) \* q\_{n-1}^B - I(P\_n^A <= P\_{n-1}^A) \* q\_n^A + I(P\_n^A >= P\_{n-1}^A) \* q\_{n-1}^A OFI\_t = sum\_{n in W\_t} e\_n DeltaMid\_t = beta\_t \* OFI\_t + err\_t 2.5 Rolling impact coefficients beta\_t = argmin\_beta sum\_{u=t-L+1..t} omega\_u \* (DeltaMid\_u - beta \* OFI\_u)^2 Qsign\_u = sum\_{i in u} eps\_i \* vol\_i lambda\_t = argmin\_lambda sum\_{u=t-L+1..t} omega\_u \* (DeltaMid\_u - lambda \* Qsign\_u)^2 Alternative concave-size impact form: DeltaMid\_u = lambda\_t \* sign(Q\_u) \* abs(Q\_u)^psi + eta\_u 0 < psi <= 1 2.6 Toxicity filter For bucket size Vstar: Vplus\_b = buy volume in bucket b Vminus\_b = sell volume in bucket b ImbBucket\_b = abs(Vplus\_b - Vminus\_b) / Vstar VPIN\_t = (1 / N) \* sum\_{b=t-N+1..t} ImbBucket\_b 2.7 Absorption, replenishment, resiliency AbsPlus\_t = VaggrPlus\_{W\_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid\_{W\_t}) / dp) AbsMinus\_t = VaggrMinus\_{W\_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid\_{W\_t}) / dp) ReplBid\_t = (DepthBid\_post - DepthBid\_min) / (Vsell\_shock + eps) ReplAsk\_t = (DepthAsk\_post - DepthAsk\_min) / (Vbuy\_shock + eps) Resil\_t = exp(-tau\_spread / tauSpreadBar) \* exp(-tau\_depth / tauDepthBar) 2.8 Metaorder impact and execution Impact\_t(Q) = Y \* sigma\_D \* sqrt(Q / (V\_D + eps)) Impact\_t(Q, partRate) = Y \* sigma\_D \* sqrt(Q / (V\_D + eps)) \* f(partRate) Execution schedule: min\_{n\_k} E(C) + LambdaRisk \* Var(C) subject to X\_k = X\_{k-1} - n\_k, X\_0 = Q, X\_N = 0 S\_k = S\_{k-1} + sigma \* sqrt(tau) \* xi\_k + gamma \* n\_k ExecPrice\_k = S\_k + eta \* (n\_k / tau) C = sum\_{k=1..N} n\_k \* ExecPrice\_k - Q \* S\_0 2.9 VWAP, TWAP, POV VWAP\_\[0,T\] = sum\_i p\_i \* vol\_i / (sum\_i vol\_i + eps) TWAP\_\[0,T\] = (1 / N) \* sum\_{k=1..N} p\_k ContinuousTWAP\_\[0,T\] = (1 / T) \* integral\_0^T p(t) dt n\_t = min(Xrem\_t, rho \* Vmarket\_t) Expected volume curve: integral\_0^T u(t) dt = 1 x'(t) = Q \* u(t) Cumulative POV target: POVTargetCum\_t = rho \* CumMarketVol\_t POVGap\_t = CumExec\_t - POVTargetCum\_t 2.10 Dark pools and internalisation proxies For equities: DPShare\_t = OffExchangeVol\_t / (TotalVol\_t + eps) ATSShare\_t = ATSVol\_t / (TotalVol\_t + eps) For fragmented OTC FX/XAUUSD: VenueShare\_{v,t} = Vol\_{v,t} / (sum\_j Vol\_{j,t} + eps) VenueMixEntropy\_t = -sum\_v VenueShare\_{v,t} \* ln(VenueShare\_{v,t} + eps) InternalisationProxy\_t = InternalMatchedFlow\_t / (TotalObservedFlow\_t + eps) If InternalMatchedFlow\_t is unavailable: InternalisationProxy\_t = 1 - ExternalHedgeFlow\_t / (TotalClientFlow\_t + eps) QuoteFade\_t = CancelledQuotedSize\_t / (PostedQuotedSize\_t + eps) 3. Trend raw signal bank Trend raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes TrendSel\_t in CategorySelectedVector\_t. 3.1 VWAP and TWAP trend distance VWAP\_t = VWAP\_\[sessionStart,t\] TWAP\_t = TWAP\_\[sessionStart,t\] VWAPDist\_t = mid\_t - VWAP\_t TWAPDist\_t = mid\_t - TWAP\_t 3.2 EMAs alpha\_n = 2 / (n + 1) EMA\_n,t = alpha\_n \* C\_t + (1 - alpha\_n) \* EMA\_n,t-1 EMAFast\_t = EMA\_{nFast,t} EMASlow\_t = EMA\_{nSlow,t} EMASpread\_t = EMAFast\_t - EMASlow\_t EMASlope\_t = EMA\_n,t - EMA\_n,t-1 3.3 ADX trend strength PlusDM\_t = max(H\_t - H\_{t-1}, 0) \* I(H\_t - H\_{t-1} > L\_{t-1} - L\_t) MinusDM\_t = max(L\_{t-1} - L\_t, 0) \* I(L\_{t-1} - L\_t > H\_t - H\_{t-1}) TR\_t = max(H\_t - L\_t, abs(H\_t - C\_{t-1}), abs(L\_t - C\_{t-1})) PlusDI\_t = 100 \* Sm(PlusDM\_t) / (Sm(TR\_t) + eps) MinusDI\_t = 100 \* Sm(MinusDM\_t) / (Sm(TR\_t) + eps) DX\_t = 100 \* abs(PlusDI\_t - MinusDI\_t) / (PlusDI\_t + MinusDI\_t + eps) ADX\_t = Sm(DX\_t) 3.4 Trendline regression price\_t = a + b \* t + err\_t TrendSlope\_t = b 4. Momentum raw signal bank Momentum raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes MomSel\_t in CategorySelectedVector\_t. 4.1 RSI RS\_t = AvgGain\_t / (AvgLoss\_t + eps) RSI\_t = 100 - 100 / (1 + RS\_t) 4.2 MACD MACD\_t = EMA12(C\_t) - EMA26(C\_t) Signal\_t = EMA9(MACD\_t) Hist\_t = MACD\_t - Signal\_t 4.3 StochRSI StochRSI\_t = 100 \* (RSI\_t - min(RSI\_{t-n+1..t})) / (max(RSI\_{t-n+1..t}) - min(RSI\_{t-n+1..t}) + eps) 4.4 ROC ROC\_t = 100 \* (C\_t / (C\_{t-n} + eps) - 1) 5. Volume raw signal bank Volume raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolSel\_t in CategorySelectedVector\_t. 5.1 VSA BarSpread\_t = H\_t - L\_t CLV\_t = (2 \* C\_t - H\_t - L\_t) / (H\_t - L\_t + eps) VolZ\_t = (V\_t - mean(V)) / (stdev(V) + eps) ER\_t = ((C\_t - O\_t) / (ATR\_t + eps)) \* VolZ\_t 5.2 Footprint Delta\_{p,t} = Vplus\_{p,t} - Vminus\_{p,t} FootprintDelta\_t = sum\_p Delta\_{p,t} ImbAsk\_{p,t} = Vplus\_{p,t} / (Vminus\_{p-dp,t} + eps) ImbBid\_{p,t} = Vminus\_{p,t} / (Vplus\_{p+dp,t} + eps) StackedImbalance\_t = 1 if there exist k consecutive price levels such that ImbAsk\_{p,t} > thetaImb or ImbBid\_{p,t} > thetaImb else 0 5.3 Volume Profile and Market Profile VP\_j = sum\_{i : p\_i in bin\_j} vol\_i POC\_t = argmax\_j VP\_j Construct Value Area by expanding from POC until cumulative volume reaches the target fraction POCDist\_t = (C\_t - POC\_t) / (ATR\_t + eps) VAState\_t = 1 if C\_t > VAH\_t, 0 if VAL\_t <= C\_t <= VAH\_t, -1 if C\_t < VAL\_t TPO\_j = sum\_{tau in session} I(price\_tau in bin\_j) TPOState\_t = 1 if C\_t > TPO\_VAH\_t, 0 if TPO\_VAL\_t <= C\_t <= TPO\_VAH\_t, -1 if C\_t < TPO\_VAL\_t 6. Volatility raw signal bank Volatility raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolaSel\_t in CategorySelectedVector\_t. 6.1 Realized and range-based volatility RV\_t = sum\_{i=1..M} r\_{t,i}^2 sigmaP\_t^2 = (1 / (4 \* ln(2))) \* (1 / n) \* sum\_{j=1..n} (ln(H\_j / L\_j))^2 sigmaP\_t = sqrt(max(sigmaP\_t^2, 0)) sigmaGK\_t^2 = (1 / n) \* sum\_{j=1..n} (0.5 \* (ln(H\_j / L\_j))^2 - (2 \* ln(2) - 1) \* (ln(C\_j / O\_j))^2) sigmaGK\_t = sqrt(max(sigmaGK\_t^2, 0)) mu1 = sqrt(2 / pi) BV\_t = mu1^(-2) \* sum\_{i=2..M} abs(r\_i) \* abs(r\_{i-1}) Jump\_t = max(RV\_t - BV\_t, 0) 6.2 ATR ATR\_t = Sm(TR\_t) 6.3 Bollinger Bands SMA\_n,t = (1 / n) \* sum\_{i=0..n-1} C\_{t-i} Std\_n,t = sqrt((1 / n) \* sum\_{i=0..n-1} (C\_{t-i} - SMA\_n,t)^2) BBUpper\_t = SMA\_n,t + kBB \* Std\_n,t BBLower\_t = SMA\_n,t - kBB \* Std\_n,t BBWidth\_t = (BBUpper\_t - BBLower\_t) / (SMA\_n,t + eps) BBPos\_t = (C\_t - BBLower\_t) / (BBUpper\_t - BBLower\_t + eps) 7. Market and Institutional Structures These are always computed and always appended to FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t. They are not subject to one-of-N category selection. 7.1 Liquidity, hunts, stops, grabs, sweeps, spread, slippage, depth fade BullishSweep\_t = 1 if L\_t < SwingLowPool\_t - epsL and C\_t > SwingLowPool\_t else 0 BearishSweep\_t = 1 if H\_t > SwingHighPool\_t + epsL and C\_t < SwingHighPool\_t else 0 SweepScore\_t = w1 \* (ExcursionBeyondPool\_t / (ATR\_t + eps)) + w2 \* (ReversalDistance\_t / (ATR\_t + eps)) + w3 \* abs(DeltaCVD\_t) + w4 \* abs(OFI\_t) SpreadShock\_t = (spread\_t - mean(spread)) / (stdev(spread) + eps) Slippage\_t = sign(side\_t) \* (Pexec\_t - Pdecision\_t) / tick Depth\_t = DOMTot\_t^(K) DepthFade\_t = 1 - Depth\_t / (mean(Depth) + eps) 7.2 Supply and Demand zones RangeBase\_t = HighBase\_t - LowBase\_t DemandZoneCandidate\_t = 1 if RangeBase\_t < betaSD \* ATR\_t and (Close\_{t+h} - HighBase\_t) / (ATR\_t + eps) > kappaSD else 0 SDScore\_t = wFresh \* Freshness\_t + wImpulse \* ImpulseStrength\_t + wUnfilled \* UnfilledFraction\_t - wRetest \* RetestCount\_t 7.3 Order Blocks BullishOB\_t = \[Low\_{cstar}, High\_{cstar}\] OBScore\_t = w1 \* Displacement\_t + w2 \* BOS\_t + w3 \* ImbalanceAdjacency\_t + w4 \* VolumeConfirm\_t - w5 \* Mitigation\_t 7.4 Wyckoff and market phases W\_t in {accumulation, markup, distribution, markdown, manipulation} If probabilistic: WyckoffScore\_t = P\_t(markup) + P\_t(accumulation) - P\_t(markdown) - P\_t(distribution) If rule-based: WyckoffScore\_t = mapped signed phase score in \[-1, 1\] 7.5 Fair Value Gaps BullishFVG\_t = 1 if Low\_t > High\_{t-2} else 0 BullishFVGZone\_t = \[High\_{t-2}, Low\_t\] GapSize\_t = Low\_t - High\_{t-2} Mit\_t = FilledLength\_t / (GapSize\_t + eps) UnfilledFrac\_t = 1 - Mit\_t FVGScore\_t = wGap \* (GapSize\_t / (ATR\_t + eps)) + wOpen \* UnfilledFrac\_t + wHTF \* HTFAlignment\_t - wMit \* Mit\_t 7.6 Pivot levels PP\_t = (H\_prev + L\_prev + C\_prev) / 3 R1\_t = 2 \* PP\_t - L\_prev S1\_t = 2 \* PP\_t - H\_prev R2\_t = PP\_t + (H\_prev - L\_prev) S2\_t = PP\_t - (H\_prev - L\_prev) PivotDist\_t = min(abs(C\_t - PP\_t), abs(C\_t - R1\_t), abs(C\_t - S1\_t), abs(C\_t - R2\_t), abs(C\_t - S2\_t)) / (ATR\_t + eps) 7.7 Objective Support and Resistance SR\_j = cluster centers of swing extrema, profile nodes, and pivots SRDist\_t = min\_j abs(C\_t - SR\_j) / (ATR\_t + eps) 7.8 Fibonacci Fib\_r = H - r \* (H - L), where r in {0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, 0.786} FibDist\_t = min\_{r in R} abs(C\_t - Fib\_r) / (ATR\_t + eps) 7.9 Trendlines price\_t = a + b \* t + err\_t TrendSlope\_t = b 7.10 Correlation rho\_xy,t = sum\_{i=1..n} (x\_i - xbar) \* (y\_i - ybar) / (sqrt(sum\_{i=1..n} (x\_i - xbar)^2) \* sqrt(sum\_{i=1..n} (y\_i - ybar)^2) + eps) 8. Category membership and selector rules Use the following default candidate sets unless overridden by config. 8.1 Institutional anti-echo subfamilies InstitutionalOrderBookCandidates\_t = { DOMSkew\_t^(K), DOMPressure\_t^(K), OBI\_t^(1), OBI\_t^(K) } InstitutionalTradeFlowCandidates\_t = { FlowImb\_\[t-h,t\], SignedFlow\_\[t-h,t\], CVD\_t, OFI\_t } InstitutionalImpactCandidates\_t = { beta\_t, lambda\_t, Impact\_t(Q) } InstitutionalExecQualityCandidates\_t = { VPIN\_t, AbsPlus\_t, AbsMinus\_t, ReplBid\_t, ReplAsk\_t, Resil\_t, POVGap\_t, DPShare\_t, ATSShare\_t, VenueMixEntropy\_t, InternalisationProxy\_t, QuoteFade\_t, TPOState\_t } InstitutionalCandidates\_t = { DOMSkew\_t^(K), DOMPressure\_t^(K), FlowImb\_\[t-h,t\], SignedFlow\_\[t-h,t\], CVD\_t, OBI\_t^(1), OBI\_t^(K), OFI\_t, beta\_t, lambda\_t, VPIN\_t, AbsPlus\_t, AbsMinus\_t, ReplBid\_t, ReplAsk\_t, Resil\_t, Impact\_t(Q), POVGap\_t, DPShare\_t, ATSShare\_t, VenueMixEntropy\_t, InternalisationProxy\_t, QuoteFade\_t, TPOState\_t } Default Institutional selection mode: SubScore\_{sf,j,t} = valid\_{j,t} \* abs(z(x\_{j,t})) \* w\_j SubSel(sf,t) = argmax\_{j in G\_sf} SubScore\_{sf,j,t} InstSubSignal\_{sf,t} = x\_{SubSel(sf,t),t} InstSel\_t = InstSubSignal\_{argmax\_{sf in SF} abs(z(InstSubSignal\_{sf,t})) \* w\_sf} Optional direct Institutional selection mode: InstSel\_t = x\_{argmax\_{j in InstitutionalCandidates\_t} valid\_{j,t} \* abs(z(x\_{j,t})) \* w\_j} 8.2 Trend candidates TrendCandidates\_t = { VWAPDist\_t, TWAPDist\_t, EMASpread\_t, EMASlope\_t, ADX\_t } 8.3 Momentum candidates MomentumCandidates\_t = { RSI\_t, MACD\_t, Signal\_t, Hist\_t, StochRSI\_t, ROC\_t } 8.4 Volume candidates VolumeCandidates\_t = { CLV\_t, VolZ\_t, ER\_t, FootprintDelta\_t, StackedImbalance\_t, POCDist\_t, VAState\_t } 8.5 Volatility candidates VolatilityCandidates\_t = { ATR\_t, RV\_t, BV\_t, Jump\_t, sigmaP\_t, sigmaGK\_t, BBWidth\_t, BBPos\_t } 8.6 General selection Dynamic category selection: score\_{j,t} = valid\_{j,t} \* abs(z(x\_{j,t})) \* w\_j sel(c,t) = argmax\_{j in G\_c} score\_{j,t} CatSignal\_{c,t} = x\_{sel(c,t),t} Fixed category selection: CatSignal\_{c,t} = x\_{jstar(c),t} Category selected outputs: InstSel\_t = CatSignal\_{Institutional,t} or the anti-echo Institutional winner defined above TrendSel\_t = CatSignal\_{Trend,t} MomSel\_t = CatSignal\_{Momentum,t} VolSel\_t = CatSignal\_{Volume,t} VolaSel\_t = CatSignal\_{Volatility,t} 9. Normalization z(x\_t) = (x\_t - mean(x)) / (stdev(x) + eps) 10. Category pass logic and signal stack Convert selected category signals into pass/fail confirmation states before alpha, execution, and risk routing. InstPass\_t = 1 if DirMap(InstSel\_t) = Dir\_t and abs(z(InstSel\_t)) >= thInst else 0 TrendPass\_t = 1 if DirMap(TrendSel\_t) = Dir\_t and abs(z(TrendSel\_t)) >= thTrend else 0 MomPass\_t = 1 if DirMap(MomSel\_t) = Dir\_t and abs(z(MomSel\_t)) >= thMom else 0 VolPass\_t = 1 if DirMap(VolSel\_t) = Dir\_t and abs(z(VolSel\_t)) >= thVol else 0 VolaPass\_t = 1 if RegimeMap(VolaSel\_t) = 1 else 0 SignalStackScore\_t = InstPass\_t + TrendPass\_t + MomPass\_t + VolPass\_t + VolaPass\_t SignalStackGate\_t = 1 if SignalStackScore\_t >= MinCategoryVotes else 0 11. Hard location gate LocationScore\_t = I(PivotDist\_t <= thPivot) + I(SRDist\_t <= thSR) + I(FibDist\_t <= thFib) + I(SDScore\_t >= thSD) + I(OBScore\_t >= thOB) + I(FVGScore\_t >= thFVG) + I(SweepScore\_t >= thSweep) + I(Dir\_t \* WyckoffScore\_t >= thWyckoff) LocationPass\_t = 1 if LocationScore\_t >= MinLocationVotes else 0 12. Vectors 12.1 Raw full signal bank for diagnostics, research, training, and optional router features RawSignalBank\_t = \[ bid\_t, ask\_t, spread\_t, relSpread\_t, mid\_t, micro\_t, DOMBid\_t^(K), DOMAsk\_t^(K), DOMTot\_t^(K), DOMSkew\_t^(K), DOMPressure\_t^(K), BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\], SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\], NetFlow\_\[t-h,t\], FlowImb\_\[t-h,t\], SignedFlow\_\[t-h,t\], CVD\_t, DeltaCVD\_t, OBI\_t^(1), OBI\_t^(K), OFI\_t, beta\_t, lambda\_t, VPIN\_t, AbsPlus\_t, AbsMinus\_t, ReplBid\_t, ReplAsk\_t, Resil\_t, Impact\_t(Q), VWAPDist\_t, TWAPDist\_t, POVGap\_t, EMAFast\_t, EMASlow\_t, EMASpread\_t, EMASlope\_t, RV\_t, BV\_t, Jump\_t, sigmaP\_t, sigmaGK\_t, ATR\_t, BBUpper\_t, BBLower\_t, BBWidth\_t, BBPos\_t, CLV\_t, VolZ\_t, ER\_t, FootprintDelta\_t, StackedImbalance\_t, POCDist\_t, VAState\_t, TPOState\_t, SweepScore\_t, SpreadShock\_t, Slippage\_t, DepthFade\_t, DPShare\_t, ATSShare\_t, VenueMixEntropy\_t, InternalisationProxy\_t, QuoteFade\_t, SDScore\_t, OBScore\_t, WyckoffScore\_t, FVGScore\_t, RSI\_t, MACD\_t, Signal\_t, Hist\_t, StochRSI\_t, ROC\_t, ADX\_t, rho\_xy,t, SRDist\_t, PivotDist\_t, FibDist\_t, TrendSlope\_t \] 12.2 Active category vector with one signal per category CategorySelectedVector\_t = \[ z(InstSel\_t), z(TrendSel\_t), z(MomSel\_t), z(VolSel\_t), z(VolaSel\_t) \] 12.3 Category pass vector for true signal-stack logic CategoryPassVector\_t = \[ InstPass\_t, TrendPass\_t, MomPass\_t, VolPass\_t, VolaPass\_t, SignalStackScore\_t, SignalStackGate\_t, LocationScore\_t, LocationPass\_t \] 12.4 Base context vector, always on BaseContextVector\_t = \[ z(bid\_t), z(ask\_t), z(spread\_t), z(relSpread\_t), z(mid\_t), z(micro\_t) \] 12.5 Structure vector, always on StructureVector\_t = \[ z(SweepScore\_t), z(SpreadShock\_t), z(Slippage\_t), z(DepthFade\_t), z(SDScore\_t), z(OBScore\_t), z(WyckoffScore\_t), z(FVGScore\_t), z(PivotDist\_t), z(SRDist\_t), z(FibDist\_t), z(TrendSlope\_t) \] 12.6 Auxiliary StructureVector\_t, AuxContextVector\_t \] Compact mode: FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t = \[ BaseContextVector\_t, CategorySelectedVector\_t, CategoryPassVector\_t, StructureVector\_t \] 13. Heads and decision rules PreFilter\_t = 1 if SignalStackGate\_t = 1 and LocationPass\_t = 1 else 0 alphaRaw\_t = wAlpha^T \* FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t execRaw\_t = 1 / (1 + exp(-wExec^T \* FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t)) risk\_t = wRisk^T \* FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t alpha\_t = PreFilter\_t \* alphaRaw\_t exec\_t = PreFilter\_t \* execRaw\_t ExecPass\_t = 1 if VPIN\_t < thetaVPIN and Resil\_t > thetaResil and SpreadShock\_t < thetaSpreadShock and abs(Slippage\_t) < thetaSlippage and DepthFade\_t < thetaDepthFade else 0 RiskPass\_t = 1 if risk\_t < thetaRisk else 0 TradeGate\_t = 1 if PreFilter\_t = 1 and alphaRaw\_t > thetaAlpha and ExecPass\_t = 1 and RiskPass\_t = 1 else 0 size\_t = sizeMax \* f(alphaRaw\_t) \* g(risk\_t) \* h(execRaw\_t) 14. Implementation rules Compute all raw formulas first, then normalize, then run category selection, then run category pass logic, then run SignalStackGate\_t and LocationPass\_t, then assemble the final vector, then evaluate alpha, execution, risk, and TradeGate\_t. Do not merge DOM, Order Flow, OBI, and OFI into one raw variable. Do not discard non-selected category signals; store them in RawSignalBank\_t. Allow config to switch category selection between fixed and dynamic modes. Allow config to switch Institutional selection between anti-echo subfamily mode and direct full-category mode. Allow config to map any candidate to any category only if explicitly configured; otherwise use the default category membership above. For FX/XAUUSD, use venue-aware aggregation for DOM, OBI, order flow, and internalisation proxies. For futures, equities, and crypto, use direct centralized-book logic when available. Keep Market/Institutional Structures always-on in FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t even though the selector only chooses one active signal from each of Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility. Preserve every formula above exactly, including RawSignalBank\_t, selector logic, pass logic, hard location gate, and final vector assembly. Implement the full RawSignalBank\_t, category selector, category pass stack, hard location gate, and FinalIntegratedStateVector\_t exactly as specified above.


UPDATE the recent response to have Fallback/Backup or "Degrade" IF ONE of the "Institutional Category Signals" is missing OR IF the WHOLE "Institutional Category Signals" is unavailable, SPECIALLY in FOREX, XAUUSD, GOLD, and other Financial Markets.


Goal:
Create a Codex-ready implementation prompt that computes the full raw signal inventory, groups signals into Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility categories, selects exactly one active signal per category, converts selected category signals into a true signal-stack with category pass/fail states, applies a hard location gate from Market/Institutional Structures, and preserves every signal and formula from the previous spec while keeping one signal per category in the active decision layer.


Context:
For FOREX and XAUUSD, assume OTC venue fragmentation. DOM, Order Flow, OBI, OFI, and execution observability must be venue-local or venue-aggregated, not fictional global consolidated feeds. U.S. ATS and off-exchange transparency is delayed. Use Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov style OFI and depth-impact structure. Use standard TA-Lib-style RSI, MACD, ADX, ATR, StochRSI, EMA, and Bollinger definitions. The architecture must avoid indicator echo by selecting one active signal from each category, then combining those selected category signals with always-on Market/Institutional Structures for the FinalIntegratedStateVector_t. The selected category signals must feed a mandatory SignalStackGate_t and a mandatory LocationPass_t before alpha, execution, and risk routing.


Constraints:
Preserve every formula below exactly.
Add explicit grouping for Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility.
Add explicit EMA, ATR, and Bollinger formulas and category membership.
Compute all raw signals even if only one signal per category is selected.
Do not require every signal in a category to be true at the same time.
Use one of two selection modes:
SelectionMode = "fixed" or SelectionMode = "dynamic"
In fixed mode, the active category signal is chosen from config.
In dynamic mode, score_{j,t} = valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * w_j, sel(c,t) = argmax_{j in G_c} score_{j,t}, CatSignal_{c,t} = x_{sel(c,t),t}
If no candidate in category c is valid, CatSignal_{c,t} = 0 and CategoryActive_{c,t} = 0
Keep DOM, Order Flow, OBI, and OFI as distinct raw signals even if only one Institutional candidate is active.
Keep raw VPIN_t, Resil_t, SpreadShock_t, Slippage_t, DepthFade_t, and InternalisationProxy_t available for hard execution and risk vetoes even if they are not the selected Institutional signal.
Base market variables are always computed and always available.
Market/Institutional Structures are always computed and always appended to the active state vector.
Correlation and dark-pool/internalisation proxies must be computed and stored; they may be appended to an auxiliary context vector or used by config.
Use z(x_t) = (x_t - mean(x)) / (stdev(x) + eps) for normalization.
Use venue-aware aggregation for FX/XAUUSD and direct centralized-book logic for futures, equities, and crypto when available.
Do not omit, merge, or rename any formula-defined feature.
Do not use TrendSlope_t as both a default Trend candidate and a default Structure feature; keep it computed in RawSignalBank_t and use it in StructureVector_t by default.
By default, use anti-echo subfamily selection inside the Institutional category so one Institutional signal is still selected overall, but the category does not become its own echo chamber.
The decision stack must be:
RawSignalBank_t -> CategorySelectedVector_t -> CategoryPassVector_t -> SignalStackGate_t -> LocationPass_t -> FinalIntegratedStateVector_t -> alpha_t, exec_t, risk_t -> TradeGate_t


Formula assumptions:
Use OFI and depth-impact structure consistent with Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov order-book event modeling, with OFI linearly linked to short-horizon price changes and the slope inversely related to depth.
Use standard TA-Lib-style RSI, MACD, ADX, ATR, EMA, StochRSI, and Bollinger definitions.
Use helper identities where needed:
Depth_t = DOMTot_t^(K) or the venue-aggregated equivalent
DeltaCVD_t = CVD_t - CVD_{t-1}
VWAP_t = VWAP_[sessionStart,t]
TWAP_t = TWAP_[sessionStart,t]
For Direction mapping:
Dir_t in {-1, +1}
For signed continuous signals, DirMap(x_t) = sign(x_t)
For RSI, DirMap(RSI_t) = 1 if RSI_t > 50 + bandRSI, -1 if RSI_t < 50 - bandRSI, else 0
For StochRSI, DirMap(StochRSI_t) = 1 if StochRSI_t > 50 + bandStoch, -1 if StochRSI_t < 50 - bandStoch, else 0
For ADX, DirMap(ADX_t) = sign(PlusDI_t - MinusDI_t) if ADX_t >= thADX, else 0
For VAState_t and TPOState_t, DirMap(x_t) = x_t
For volatility candidates, use RegimeMap(x_t) rather than directional sign:
RegimeMap(ATR_t) = 1 if ATR_t in [thATRMin, thATRMax], else 0
RegimeMap(BBWidth_t) = 1 if BBWidth_t in [thBBWidthMin, thBBWidthMax], else 0
RegimeMap(RV_t) = 1 if RV_t in [thRVMin, thRVMax], else 0
RegimeMap(BV_t) = 1 if BV_t in [thBVMin, thBVMax], else 0
RegimeMap(Jump_t) = 1 if Jump_t <= thJumpMax, else 0
RegimeMap(sigmaP_t) = 1 if sigmaP_t in [thSigmaPMin, thSigmaPMax], else 0
RegimeMap(sigmaGK_t) = 1 if sigmaGK_t in [thSigmaGKMin, thSigmaGKMax], else 0
RegimeMap(BBPos_t) = 1 if BBWidth_t in [thBBWidthMin, thBBWidthMax], else 0


Required output:
Build seven layers:


RawSignalBank_t

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

SignalStackGate_t

LocationPass_t

FinalIntegratedStateVector_t

alpha_t, exec_t, risk_t, TradeGate_t

Base market variables
bid_t = best bid
ask_t = best ask
spread_t = ask_t - bid_t
mid_t = (ask_t + bid_t) / 2
relSpread_t = (ask_t - bid_t) / (mid_t + eps)
bidSize_t = best bid size
askSize_t = best ask size
micro_t = (ask_t * bidSize_t + bid_t * askSize_t) / (bidSize_t + askSize_t + eps)


If venue aggregated:
midAgg_t = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * mid_{t,v}
spreadAgg_t = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * spread_{t,v}
sum_{v=1..V} w_v = 1


Institutional raw signal bank
Institutional raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes InstSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t. All raw Institutional signals remain available in RawSignalBank_t.


2.1 Order Books and explicit Depth of Market
DOMBid_t^(K) = sum_{k=1..K} w_k * B_{k,t}
DOMAsk_t^(K) = sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t}
DOMTot_t^(K) = DOMBid_t^(K) + DOMAsk_t^(K)
DOMSkew_t^(K) = (DOMBid_t^(K) - DOMAsk_t^(K)) / (DOMBid_t^(K) + DOMAsk_t^(K) + eps)
DOMPressure_t^(K) = sum_{k=1..K} w_k * (B_{k,t} - A_{k,t})
Use w_k = exp(-alphaDepth * (k - 1)) or another monotone decay.


If OTC venue aggregated:
DOMBidAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * DOMBid_{t,v}^(K)
DOMAskAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * DOMAsk_{t,v}^(K)
DOMSkewAgg_t^(K) = (DOMBidAgg_t^(K) - DOMAskAgg_t^(K)) / (DOMBidAgg_t^(K) + DOMAskAgg_t^(K) + eps)


2.2 Explicit Order Flow
eps_i in {-1, +1}
flow_i = eps_i * vol_i
BuyFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} I(eps_i = +1) * vol_i
SellFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} I(eps_i = -1) * vol_i
NetFlow_[t-h,t] = BuyFlow_[t-h,t] - SellFlow_[t-h,t]
FlowImb_[t-h,t] = (BuyFlow_[t-h,t] - SellFlow_[t-h,t]) / (BuyFlow_[t-h,t] + SellFlow_[t-h,t] + eps)
SignedFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} eps_i * vol_i
CVD_t = CVD_{t-1} + sum_{i in (t-dt,t]} eps_i * vol_i
DeltaCVD_t = CVD_t - CVD_{t-1}


2.3 Order Book Imbalance, explicit OBI
OBI_t^(1) = (bidSize_t - askSize_t) / (bidSize_t + askSize_t + eps)
OBI_t^(K) = (sum_{k=1..K} w_k * B_{k,t} - sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t}) / (sum_{k=1..K} w_k * B_{k,t} + sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t} + eps)


If OTC venue aggregated:
OBIAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * OBI_{t,v}^(K)


Keep the alias explicit:
OBI_t^(1) = DOMSkew_t^(1)


2.4 Event-based OFI
e_n = I(P_n^B >= P_{n-1}^B) * q_n^B - I(P_n^B <= P_{n-1}^B) * q_{n-1}^B - I(P_n^A <= P_{n-1}^A) * q_n^A + I(P_n^A >= P_{n-1}^A) * q_{n-1}^A
OFI_t = sum_{n in W_t} e_n
DeltaMid_t = beta_t * OFI_t + err_t


2.5 Rolling impact coefficients
beta_t = argmin_beta sum_{u=t-L+1..t} omega_u * (DeltaMid_u - beta * OFI_u)^2
Qsign_u = sum_{i in u} eps_i * vol_i
lambda_t = argmin_lambda sum_{u=t-L+1..t} omega_u * (DeltaMid_u - lambda * Qsign_u)^2


Alternative concave-size impact form:
DeltaMid_u = lambda_t * sign(Q_u) * abs(Q_u)^psi + eta_u
0 < psi <= 1


2.6 Toxicity filter
For bucket size Vstar:
Vplus_b = buy volume in bucket b
Vminus_b = sell volume in bucket b
ImbBucket_b = abs(Vplus_b - Vminus_b) / Vstar
VPIN_t = (1 / N) * sum_{b=t-N+1..t} ImbBucket_b


2.7 Absorption, replenishment, resiliency
AbsPlus_t = VaggrPlus_{W_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid_{W_t}) / dp)
AbsMinus_t = VaggrMinus_{W_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid_{W_t}) / dp)
ReplBid_t = (DepthBid_post - DepthBid_min) / (Vsell_shock + eps)
ReplAsk_t = (DepthAsk_post - DepthAsk_min) / (Vbuy_shock + eps)
Resil_t = exp(-tau_spread / tauSpreadBar) * exp(-tau_depth / tauDepthBar)


2.8 Metaorder impact and execution
Impact_t(Q) = Y * sigma_D * sqrt(Q / (V_D + eps))
Impact_t(Q, partRate) = Y * sigma_D * sqrt(Q / (V_D + eps)) * f(partRate)


Execution schedule:
min_{n_k} E(C) + LambdaRisk * Var(C)
subject to X_k = X_{k-1} - n_k, X_0 = Q, X_N = 0
S_k = S_{k-1} + sigma * sqrt(tau) * xi_k + gamma * n_k
ExecPrice_k = S_k + eta * (n_k / tau)
C = sum_{k=1..N} n_k * ExecPrice_k - Q * S_0


2.9 VWAP, TWAP, POV
VWAP_[0,T] = sum_i p_i * vol_i / (sum_i vol_i + eps)
TWAP_[0,T] = (1 / N) * sum_{k=1..N} p_k
ContinuousTWAP_[0,T] = (1 / T) * integral_0^T p(t) dt
n_t = min(Xrem_t, rho * Vmarket_t)


Expected volume curve:
integral_0^T u(t) dt = 1
x'(t) = Q * u(t)


Cumulative POV target:
POVTargetCum_t = rho * CumMarketVol_t
POVGap_t = CumExec_t - POVTargetCum_t


2.10 Dark pools and internalisation proxies
For equities:
DPShare_t = OffExchangeVol_t / (TotalVol_t + eps)
ATSShare_t = ATSVol_t / (TotalVol_t + eps)


For fragmented OTC FX/XAUUSD:
VenueShare_{v,t} = Vol_{v,t} / (sum_j Vol_{j,t} + eps)
VenueMixEntropy_t = -sum_v VenueShare_{v,t} * ln(VenueShare_{v,t} + eps)
InternalisationProxy_t = InternalMatchedFlow_t / (TotalObservedFlow_t + eps)


If InternalMatchedFlow_t is unavailable:
InternalisationProxy_t = 1 - ExternalHedgeFlow_t / (TotalClientFlow_t + eps)


QuoteFade_t = CancelledQuotedSize_t / (PostedQuotedSize_t + eps)


Trend raw signal bank
Trend raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes TrendSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


3.1 VWAP and TWAP trend distance
VWAP_t = VWAP_[sessionStart,t]
TWAP_t = TWAP_[sessionStart,t]
VWAPDist_t = mid_t - VWAP_t
TWAPDist_t = mid_t - TWAP_t


3.2 EMAs
alpha_n = 2 / (n + 1)
EMA_n,t = alpha_n * C_t + (1 - alpha_n) * EMA_n,t-1
EMAFast_t = EMA_{nFast,t}
EMASlow_t = EMA_{nSlow,t}
EMASpread_t = EMAFast_t - EMASlow_t
EMASlope_t = EMA_n,t - EMA_n,t-1


3.3 ADX trend strength
PlusDM_t = max(H_t - H_{t-1}, 0) * I(H_t - H_{t-1} > L_{t-1} - L_t)
MinusDM_t = max(L_{t-1} - L_t, 0) * I(L_{t-1} - L_t > H_t - H_{t-1})
TR_t = max(H_t - L_t, abs(H_t - C_{t-1}), abs(L_t - C_{t-1}))
PlusDI_t = 100 * Sm(PlusDM_t) / (Sm(TR_t) + eps)
MinusDI_t = 100 * Sm(MinusDM_t) / (Sm(TR_t) + eps)
DX_t = 100 * abs(PlusDI_t - MinusDI_t) / (PlusDI_t + MinusDI_t + eps)
ADX_t = Sm(DX_t)


3.4 Trendline regression
price_t = a + b * t + err_t
TrendSlope_t = b


Momentum raw signal bank
Momentum raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes MomSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


4.1 RSI
RS_t = AvgGain_t / (AvgLoss_t + eps)
RSI_t = 100 - 100 / (1 + RS_t)


4.2 MACD
MACD_t = EMA12(C_t) - EMA26(C_t)
Signal_t = EMA9(MACD_t)
Hist_t = MACD_t - Signal_t


4.3 StochRSI
StochRSI_t = 100 * (RSI_t - min(RSI_{t-n+1..t})) / (max(RSI_{t-n+1..t}) - min(RSI_{t-n+1..t}) + eps)


4.4 ROC
ROC_t = 100 * (C_t / (C_{t-n} + eps) - 1)


Volume raw signal bank
Volume raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


5.1 VSA
BarSpread_t = H_t - L_t
CLV_t = (2 * C_t - H_t - L_t) / (H_t - L_t + eps)
VolZ_t = (V_t - mean(V)) / (stdev(V) + eps)
ER_t = ((C_t - O_t) / (ATR_t + eps)) * VolZ_t


5.2 Footprint
Delta_{p,t} = Vplus_{p,t} - Vminus_{p,t}
FootprintDelta_t = sum_p Delta_{p,t}
ImbAsk_{p,t} = Vplus_{p,t} / (Vminus_{p-dp,t} + eps)
ImbBid_{p,t} = Vminus_{p,t} / (Vplus_{p+dp,t} + eps)
StackedImbalance_t = 1 if there exist k consecutive price levels such that ImbAsk_{p,t} > thetaImb or ImbBid_{p,t} > thetaImb else 0


5.3 Volume Profile and Market Profile
VP_j = sum_{i : p_i in bin_j} vol_i
POC_t = argmax_j VP_j
Construct Value Area by expanding from POC until cumulative volume reaches the target fraction
POCDist_t = (C_t - POC_t) / (ATR_t + eps)
VAState_t = 1 if C_t > VAH_t, 0 if VAL_t <= C_t <= VAH_t, -1 if C_t < VAL_t


TPO_j = sum_{tau in session} I(price_tau in bin_j)
TPOState_t = 1 if C_t > TPO_VAH_t, 0 if TPO_VAL_t <= C_t <= TPO_VAH_t, -1 if C_t < TPO_VAL_t


Volatility raw signal bank
Volatility raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolaSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


6.1 Realized and range-based volatility
RV_t = sum_{i=1..M} r_{t,i}^2
sigmaP_t^2 = (1 / (4 * ln(2))) * (1 / n) * sum_{j=1..n} (ln(H_j / L_j))^2
sigmaP_t = sqrt(max(sigmaP_t^2, 0))
sigmaGK_t^2 = (1 / n) * sum_{j=1..n} (0.5 * (ln(H_j / L_j))^2 - (2 * ln(2) - 1) * (ln(C_j / O_j))^2)
sigmaGK_t = sqrt(max(sigmaGK_t^2, 0))
mu1 = sqrt(2 / pi)
BV_t = mu1^(-2) * sum_{i=2..M} abs(r_i) * abs(r_{i-1})
Jump_t = max(RV_t - BV_t, 0)


6.2 ATR
ATR_t = Sm(TR_t)


6.3 Bollinger Bands
SMA_n,t = (1 / n) * sum_{i=0..n-1} C_{t-i}
Std_n,t = sqrt((1 / n) * sum_{i=0..n-1} (C_{t-i} - SMA_n,t)^2)
BBUpper_t = SMA_n,t + kBB * Std_n,t
BBLower_t = SMA_n,t - kBB * Std_n,t
BBWidth_t = (BBUpper_t - BBLower_t) / (SMA_n,t + eps)
BBPos_t = (C_t - BBLower_t) / (BBUpper_t - BBLower_t + eps)


Market and Institutional Structures
These are always computed and always appended to FinalIntegratedStateVector_t. They are not subject to one-of-N category selection.


7.1 Liquidity, hunts, stops, grabs, sweeps, spread, slippage, depth fade
BullishSweep_t = 1 if L_t < SwingLowPool_t - epsL and C_t > SwingLowPool_t else 0
BearishSweep_t = 1 if H_t > SwingHighPool_t + epsL and C_t < SwingHighPool_t else 0
SweepScore_t = w1 * (ExcursionBeyondPool_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + w2 * (ReversalDistance_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + w3 * abs(DeltaCVD_t) + w4 * abs(OFI_t)
SpreadShock_t = (spread_t - mean(spread)) / (stdev(spread) + eps)
Slippage_t = sign(side_t) * (Pexec_t - Pdecision_t) / tick
Depth_t = DOMTot_t^(K)
DepthFade_t = 1 - Depth_t / (mean(Depth) + eps)


7.2 Supply and Demand zones
RangeBase_t = HighBase_t - LowBase_t
DemandZoneCandidate_t = 1 if RangeBase_t < betaSD * ATR_t and (Close_{t+h} - HighBase_t) / (ATR_t + eps) > kappaSD else 0
SDScore_t = wFresh * Freshness_t + wImpulse * ImpulseStrength_t + wUnfilled * UnfilledFraction_t - wRetest * RetestCount_t


7.3 Order Blocks
BullishOB_t = [Low_{cstar}, High_{cstar}]
OBScore_t = w1 * Displacement_t + w2 * BOS_t + w3 * ImbalanceAdjacency_t + w4 * VolumeConfirm_t - w5 * Mitigation_t


7.4 Wyckoff and market phases
W_t in {accumulation, markup, distribution, markdown, manipulation}
If probabilistic:
WyckoffScore_t = P_t(markup) + P_t(accumulation) - P_t(markdown) - P_t(distribution)
If rule-based:
WyckoffScore_t = mapped signed phase score in [-1, 1]


7.5 Fair Value Gaps
BullishFVG_t = 1 if Low_t > High_{t-2} else 0
BullishFVGZone_t = [High_{t-2}, Low_t]
GapSize_t = Low_t - High_{t-2}
Mit_t = FilledLength_t / (GapSize_t + eps)
UnfilledFrac_t = 1 - Mit_t
FVGScore_t = wGap * (GapSize_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + wOpen * UnfilledFrac_t + wHTF * HTFAlignment_t - wMit * Mit_t


7.6 Pivot levels
PP_t = (H_prev + L_prev + C_prev) / 3
R1_t = 2 * PP_t - L_prev
S1_t = 2 * PP_t - H_prev
R2_t = PP_t + (H_prev - L_prev)
S2_t = PP_t - (H_prev - L_prev)
PivotDist_t = min(abs(C_t - PP_t), abs(C_t - R1_t), abs(C_t - S1_t), abs(C_t - R2_t), abs(C_t - S2_t)) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.7 Objective Support and Resistance
SR_j = cluster centers of swing extrema, profile nodes, and pivots
SRDist_t = min_j abs(C_t - SR_j) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.8 Fibonacci
Fib_r = H - r * (H - L), where r in {0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, 0.786}
FibDist_t = min_{r in R} abs(C_t - Fib_r) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.9 Trendlines
price_t = a + b * t + err_t
TrendSlope_t = b


7.10 Correlation
rho_xy,t = sum_{i=1..n} (x_i - xbar) * (y_i - ybar) / (sqrt(sum_{i=1..n} (x_i - xbar)^2) * sqrt(sum_{i=1..n} (y_i - ybar)^2) + eps)

DOMAsk_t^(K) = sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t}
DOMTot_t^(K) = DOMBid_t^(K) + DOMAsk_t^(K)
DOMSkew_t^(K) = (DOMBid_t^(K) - DOMAsk_t^(K)) / (DOMBid_t^(K) + DOMAsk_t^(K) + eps)
DOMPressure_t^(K) = sum_{k=1..K} w_k * (B_{k,t} - A_{k,t})
Use w_k = exp(-alphaDepth * (k - 1)) or another monotone decay.


If OTC venue aggregated:
DOMBidAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * DOMBid_{t,v}^(K)
DOMAskAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * DOMAsk_{t,v}^(K)
DOMSkewAgg_t^(K) = (DOMBidAgg_t^(K) - DOMAskAgg_t^(K)) / (DOMBidAgg_t^(K) + DOMAskAgg_t^(K) + eps)


2.2 Explicit Order Flow
eps_i in {-1, +1}
flow_i = eps_i * vol_i
BuyFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} I(eps_i = +1) * vol_i
SellFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} I(eps_i = -1) * vol_i
NetFlow_[t-h,t] = BuyFlow_[t-h,t] - SellFlow_[t-h,t]
FlowImb_[t-h,t] = (BuyFlow_[t-h,t] - SellFlow_[t-h,t]) / (BuyFlow_[t-h,t] + SellFlow_[t-h,t] + eps)
SignedFlow_[t-h,t] = sum_{i in [t-h,t]} eps_i * vol_i
CVD_t = CVD_{t-1} + sum_{i in (t-dt,t]} eps_i * vol_i
DeltaCVD_t = CVD_t - CVD_{t-1}


2.3 Order Book Imbalance, explicit OBI
OBI_t^(1) = (bidSize_t - askSize_t) / (bidSize_t + askSize_t + eps)
OBI_t^(K) = (sum_{k=1..K} w_k * B_{k,t} - sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t}) / (sum_{k=1..K} w_k * B_{k,t} + sum_{k=1..K} w_k * A_{k,t} + eps)


If OTC venue aggregated:
OBIAgg_t^(K) = sum_{v=1..V} w_v * OBI_{t,v}^(K)


Keep the alias explicit:
OBI_t^(1) = DOMSkew_t^(1)


2.4 Event-based OFI
e_n = I(P_n^B >= P_{n-1}^B) * q_n^B - I(P_n^B <= P_{n-1}^B) * q_{n-1}^B - I(P_n^A <= P_{n-1}^A) * q_n^A + I(P_n^A >= P_{n-1}^A) * q_{n-1}^A
OFI_t = sum_{n in W_t} e_n
DeltaMid_t = beta_t * OFI_t + err_t


2.5 Rolling impact coefficients
beta_t = argmin_beta sum_{u=t-L+1..t} omega_u * (DeltaMid_u - beta * OFI_u)^2
Qsign_u = sum_{i in u} eps_i * vol_i
lambda_t = argmin_lambda sum_{u=t-L+1..t} omega_u * (DeltaMid_u - lambda * Qsign_u)^2


Alternative concave-size impact form:
DeltaMid_u = lambda_t * sign(Q_u) * abs(Q_u)^psi + eta_u
0 < psi <= 1


2.6 Toxicity filter
For bucket size Vstar:
Vplus_b = buy volume in bucket b
Vminus_b = sell volume in bucket b
ImbBucket_b = abs(Vplus_b - Vminus_b) / Vstar
VPIN_t = (1 / N) * sum_{b=t-N+1..t} ImbBucket_b


2.7 Absorption, replenishment, resiliency
AbsPlus_t = VaggrPlus_{W_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid_{W_t}) / dp)
AbsMinus_t = VaggrMinus_{W_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid_{W_t}) / dp)
ReplBid_t = (DepthBid_post - DepthBid_min) / (Vsell_shock + eps)
ReplAsk_t = (DepthAsk_post - DepthAsk_min) / (Vbuy_shock + eps)
Resil_t = exp(-tau_spread / tauSpreadBar) * exp(-tau_depth / tauDepthBar)


2.8 Metaorder impact and execution
Impact_t(Q) = Y * sigma_D * sqrt(Q / (V_D + eps))
Impact_t(Q, partRate) = Y * sigma_D * sqrt(Q / (V_D + eps)) * f(partRate)


Execution schedule:
min_{n_k} E(C) + LambdaRisk * Var(C)
subject to X_k = X_{k-1} - n_k, X_0 = Q, X_N = 0
S_k = S_{k-1} + sigma * sqrt(tau) * xi_k + gamma * n_k
ExecPrice_k = S_k + eta * (n_k / tau)
C = sum_{k=1..N} n_k * ExecPrice_k - Q * S_0


2.9 VWAP, TWAP, POV
VWAP_[0,T] = sum_i p_i * vol_i / (sum_i vol_i + eps)
TWAP_[0,T] = (1 / N) * sum_{k=1..N} p_k
ContinuousTWAP_[0,T] = (1 / T) * integral_0^T p(t) dt
n_t = min(Xrem_t, rho * Vmarket_t)


Expected volume curve:
integral_0^T u(t) dt = 1
x'(t) = Q * u(t)


Cumulative POV target:
POVTargetCum_t = rho * CumMarketVol_t
POVGap_t = CumExec_t - POVTargetCum_t


2.10 Dark pools and internalisation proxies
For equities:
DPShare_t = OffExchangeVol_t / (TotalVol_t + eps)
ATSShare_t = ATSVol_t / (TotalVol_t + eps)


For fragmented OTC FX/XAUUSD:
VenueShare_{v,t} = Vol_{v,t} / (sum_j Vol_{j,t} + eps)
VenueMixEntropy_t = -sum_v VenueShare_{v,t} * ln(VenueShare_{v,t} + eps)
InternalisationProxy_t = InternalMatchedFlow_t / (TotalObservedFlow_t + eps)


If InternalMatchedFlow_t is unavailable:
InternalisationProxy_t = 1 - ExternalHedgeFlow_t / (TotalClientFlow_t + eps)


QuoteFade_t = CancelledQuotedSize_t / (PostedQuotedSize_t + eps)


Trend raw signal bank
Trend raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes TrendSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


3.1 VWAP and TWAP trend distance
VWAP_t = VWAP_[sessionStart,t]
TWAP_t = TWAP_[sessionStart,t]
VWAPDist_t = mid_t - VWAP_t
TWAPDist_t = mid_t - TWAP_t


3.2 EMAs
alpha_n = 2 / (n + 1)
EMA_n,t = alpha_n * C_t + (1 - alpha_n) * EMA_n,t-1
EMAFast_t = EMA_{nFast,t}
EMASlow_t = EMA_{nSlow,t}
EMASpread_t = EMAFast_t - EMASlow_t
EMASlope_t = EMA_n,t - EMA_n,t-1


3.3 ADX trend strength
PlusDM_t = max(H_t - H_{t-1}, 0) * I(H_t - H_{t-1} > L_{t-1} - L_t)
MinusDM_t = max(L_{t-1} - L_t, 0) * I(L_{t-1} - L_t > H_t - H_{t-1})
TR_t = max(H_t - L_t, abs(H_t - C_{t-1}), abs(L_t - C_{t-1}))
PlusDI_t = 100 * Sm(PlusDM_t) / (Sm(TR_t) + eps)
MinusDI_t = 100 * Sm(MinusDM_t) / (Sm(TR_t) + eps)
DX_t = 100 * abs(PlusDI_t - MinusDI_t) / (PlusDI_t + MinusDI_t + eps)
ADX_t = Sm(DX_t)


3.4 Trendline regression
price_t = a + b * t + err_t
TrendSlope_t = b


Momentum raw signal bank
Momentum raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes MomSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


4.1 RSI
RS_t = AvgGain_t / (AvgLoss_t + eps)
RSI_t = 100 - 100 / (1 + RS_t)


4.2 MACD
MACD_t = EMA12(C_t) - EMA26(C_t)
Signal_t = EMA9(MACD_t)
Hist_t = MACD_t - Signal_t


4.3 StochRSI
StochRSI_t = 100 * (RSI_t - min(RSI_{t-n+1..t})) / (max(RSI_{t-n+1..t}) - min(RSI_{t-n+1..t}) + eps)


4.4 ROC
ROC_t = 100 * (C_t / (C_{t-n} + eps) - 1)


Volume raw signal bank
Volume raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


5.1 VSA
BarSpread_t = H_t - L_t
CLV_t = (2 * C_t - H_t - L_t) / (H_t - L_t + eps)
VolZ_t = (V_t - mean(V)) / (stdev(V) + eps)
ER_t = ((C_t - O_t) / (ATR_t + eps)) * VolZ_t


5.2 Footprint
Delta_{p,t} = Vplus_{p,t} - Vminus_{p,t}
FootprintDelta_t = sum_p Delta_{p,t}
ImbAsk_{p,t} = Vplus_{p,t} / (Vminus_{p-dp,t} + eps)
ImbBid_{p,t} = Vminus_{p,t} / (Vplus_{p+dp,t} + eps)
StackedImbalance_t = 1 if there exist k consecutive price levels such that ImbAsk_{p,t} > thetaImb or ImbBid_{p,t} > thetaImb else 0


5.3 Volume Profile and Market Profile
VP_j = sum_{i : p_i in bin_j} vol_i
POC_t = argmax_j VP_j
Construct Value Area by expanding from POC until cumulative volume reaches the target fraction
POCDist_t = (C_t - POC_t) / (ATR_t + eps)
VAState_t = 1 if C_t > VAH_t, 0 if VAL_t <= C_t <= VAH_t, -1 if C_t < VAL_t


TPO_j = sum_{tau in session} I(price_tau in bin_j)
TPOState_t = 1 if C_t > TPO_VAH_t, 0 if TPO_VAL_t <= C_t <= TPO_VAH_t, -1 if C_t < TPO_VAL_t


Volatility raw signal bank
Volatility raw signals are computed separately. Only one becomes VolaSel_t in CategorySelectedVector_t.


6.1 Realized and range-based volatility
RV_t = sum_{i=1..M} r_{t,i}^2
sigmaP_t^2 = (1 / (4 * ln(2))) * (1 / n) * sum_{j=1..n} (ln(H_j / L_j))^2
sigmaP_t = sqrt(max(sigmaP_t^2, 0))
sigmaGK_t^2 = (1 / n) * sum_{j=1..n} (0.5 * (ln(H_j / L_j))^2 - (2 * ln(2) - 1) * (ln(C_j / O_j))^2)
sigmaGK_t = sqrt(max(sigmaGK_t^2, 0))
mu1 = sqrt(2 / pi)
BV_t = mu1^(-2) * sum_{i=2..M} abs(r_i) * abs(r_{i-1})
Jump_t = max(RV_t - BV_t, 0)


6.2 ATR
ATR_t = Sm(TR_t)


6.3 Bollinger Bands
SMA_n,t = (1 / n) * sum_{i=0..n-1} C_{t-i}
Std_n,t = sqrt((1 / n) * sum_{i=0..n-1} (C_{t-i} - SMA_n,t)^2)
BBUpper_t = SMA_n,t + kBB * Std_n,t
BBLower_t = SMA_n,t - kBB * Std_n,t
BBWidth_t = (BBUpper_t - BBLower_t) / (SMA_n,t + eps)
BBPos_t = (C_t - BBLower_t) / (BBUpper_t - BBLower_t + eps)


Market and Institutional Structures
These are always computed and always appended to FinalIntegratedStateVector_t. They are not subject to one-of-N category selection.


7.1 Liquidity, hunts, stops, grabs, sweeps, spread, slippage, depth fade
BullishSweep_t = 1 if L_t < SwingLowPool_t - epsL and C_t > SwingLowPool_t else 0
BearishSweep_t = 1 if H_t > SwingHighPool_t + epsL and C_t < SwingHighPool_t else 0
SweepScore_t = w1 * (ExcursionBeyondPool_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + w2 * (ReversalDistance_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + w3 * abs(DeltaCVD_t) + w4 * abs(OFI_t)
SpreadShock_t = (spread_t - mean(spread)) / (stdev(spread) + eps)
Slippage_t = sign(side_t) * (Pexec_t - Pdecision_t) / tick
Depth_t = DOMTot_t^(K)
DepthFade_t = 1 - Depth_t / (mean(Depth) + eps)


7.2 Supply and Demand zones
RangeBase_t = HighBase_t - LowBase_t
DemandZoneCandidate_t = 1 if RangeBase_t < betaSD * ATR_t and (Close_{t+h} - HighBase_t) / (ATR_t + eps) > kappaSD else 0
SDScore_t = wFresh * Freshness_t + wImpulse * ImpulseStrength_t + wUnfilled * UnfilledFraction_t - wRetest * RetestCount_t


7.3 Order Blocks
BullishOB_t = [Low_{cstar}, High_{cstar}]
OBScore_t = w1 * Displacement_t + w2 * BOS_t + w3 * ImbalanceAdjacency_t + w4 * VolumeConfirm_t - w5 * Mitigation_t


7.4 Wyckoff and market phases
W_t in {accumulation, markup, distribution, markdown, manipulation}
If probabilistic:
WyckoffScore_t = P_t(markup) + P_t(accumulation) - P_t(markdown) - P_t(distribution)
If rule-based:
WyckoffScore_t = mapped signed phase score in [-1, 1]


7.5 Fair Value Gaps
BullishFVG_t = 1 if Low_t > High_{t-2} else 0
BullishFVGZone_t = [High_{t-2}, Low_t]
GapSize_t = Low_t - High_{t-2}
Mit_t = FilledLength_t / (GapSize_t + eps)
UnfilledFrac_t = 1 - Mit_t
FVGScore_t = wGap * (GapSize_t / (ATR_t + eps)) + wOpen * UnfilledFrac_t + wHTF * HTFAlignment_t - wMit * Mit_t


7.6 Pivot levels
PP_t = (H_prev + L_prev + C_prev) / 3
R1_t = 2 * PP_t - L_prev
S1_t = 2 * PP_t - H_prev
R2_t = PP_t + (H_prev - L_prev)
S2_t = PP_t - (H_prev - L_prev)
PivotDist_t = min(abs(C_t - PP_t), abs(C_t - R1_t), abs(C_t - S1_t), abs(C_t - R2_t), abs(C_t - S2_t)) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.7 Objective Support and Resistance
SR_j = cluster centers of swing extrema, profile nodes, and pivots
SRDist_t = min_j abs(C_t - SR_j) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.8 Fibonacci
Fib_r = H - r * (H - L), where r in {0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, 0.786}
FibDist_t = min_{r in R} abs(C_t - Fib_r) / (ATR_t + eps)


7.9 Trendlines
price_t = a + b * t + err_t
TrendSlope_t = b


7.10 Correlation
rho_xy,t = sum_{i=1..n} (x_i - xbar) * (y_i - ybar) / (sqrt(sum_{i=1..n} (x_i - xbar)^2) * sqrt(sum_{i=1..n} (y_i - ybar)^2) + eps)


Category membership, selection, availability, and degrade rules
Use the following default candidate sets unless overridden by config.

CVD_t,

Default Institutional selection mode:
SubScore_{sf,j,t} = valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * w_j
SubSel(sf,t) = argmax_{j in G_sf} SubScore_{sf,j,t}
InstSubSignal_{sf,t} = x_{SubSel(sf,t),t}
InstSel_t = InstSubSignal_{argmax_{sf in SF} abs(z(InstSubSignal_{sf,t})) * w_sf}


Optional direct Institutional selection mode:

8.6 General selection
Dynamic category selection:
score_{j,t} = valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * w_j
sel(c,t) = argmax_{j in G_c} score_{j,t}
CatSignal_{c,t} = x_{sel(c,t),t}


Fixed category selection:
CatSignal_{c,t} = x_{jstar(c),t}


Category selected outputs:
InstSel_t = CatSignal_{Institutional,t} or the anti-echo Institutional winner defined above
TrendSel_t = CatSignal_{Trend,t}
MomSel_t = CatSignal_{Momentum,t}
VolSel_t = CatSignal_{Volume,t}
VolaSel_t = CatSignal_{Volatility,t}


8.7 Institutional availability and coverage
valid_{j,t} = 1 if x_{j,t} is finite and source freshness <= max_age_j and source quality >= qmin_j else 0


SubAvail_OB_t = 1 if there exists j in InstitutionalOrderBookCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0
SubAvail_TF_t = 1 if there exists j in InstitutionalTradeFlowCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0
SubAvail_IMP_t = 1 if there exists j in InstitutionalImpactCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0
SubAvail_EQ_t = 1 if there exists j in InstitutionalExecQualityCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0


InstAvailable_t = 1 if there exists j in InstitutionalCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0
InstCoverage_t = (wOB * SubAvail_OB_t + wTF * SubAvail_TF_t + wIMP * SubAvail_IMP_t + wEQ * SubAvail_EQ_t) / (wOB + wTF + wIMP + wEQ + eps)
InstPartial_t = 1 if InstAvailable_t = 1 and InstCoverage_t < thInstCoverageUsable else 0
InstUnavailable_t = 1 if InstAvailable_t = 0 else 0


8.8 Missing one Institutional signal or one subfamily
If SelectionMode = "fixed" and valid_{jstar(Institutional),t} = 0:
InstSel_t = x_{argmax_{j in G_sf(jstar)} valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * w_j}
If no valid candidate exists in the same Institutional subfamily:
InstSel_t = x_{argmax_{j in InstitutionalCandidates_t} valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * w_j}
If no valid direct Institutional candidate exists:
apply section 8.9 and 8.10


If SelectionMode = "dynamic":
ignore all invalid Institutional candidates and rescore only valid direct candidates
If one subfamily is empty but others are available:
keep direct Institutional selection active from remaining subfamilies
Do not zero the whole Institutional category because one direct signal or one subfamily is missing


8.9 Institutional proxy degrade bank
Compute proxy Institutional signals only from always-available quote, profile, and structure observables. Do not fabricate DOM, OBI, OFI, CVD, or signed-flow truth from candle-only data.


MicropriceBias_t = (micro_t - mid_t) / (spread_t + eps)
AuctionBias_t = 0.5 * VAState_t + 0.5 * TPOState_t
LiquidityStressProxy_t = -(max(SpreadShock_t, 0) + max(DepthFade_t, 0) + abs(Slippage_t)) / 3
ProxyInstComposite_t = 0.5 * MicropriceBias_t + 0.5 * AuctionBias_t + LiquidityStressProxy_t


ProxyInstCandidates_t = {
MicropriceBias_t,
AuctionBias_t,
ProxyInstComposite_t
}


ProxyInstAvailable_t = 1 if there exists j in ProxyInstCandidates_t such that valid_{j,t} = 1 else 0
ProxyScore_{j,t} = valid_{j,t} * abs(z(x_{j,t})) * wProxy_j
ProxyInstSel_t = x_{argmax_{j in ProxyInstCandidates_t} ProxyScore_{j,t}}


8.10 Whole Institutional category unavailable degrade modes
InstitutionalDegradeMode in {
"proxy_substitute",
"proxy_substitute_then_stack_relax",
"soft_neutral_then_stack_relax",
"hard_block"
}


InstSelSource_t = 2 if direct Institutional selected else 1 if proxy Institutional selected else 0


If InstUnavailable_t = 1 and ProxyInstAvailable_t = 1 and InstitutionalDegradeMode in {"proxy_substitute", "proxy_substitute_then_stack_relax"}:
InstSel_t = ProxyInstSel_t
InstSelSource_t = 1


If InstUnavailable_t = 1 and ProxyInstAvailable_t = 0 and InstitutionalDegradeMode = "soft_neutral_then_stack_relax":
InstSel_t = 0
InstSelSource_t = 0


If InstUnavailable_t = 1 and ProxyInstAvailable_t = 0 and InstitutionalDegradeMode = "hard_block":
InstSel_t = 0
InstSelSource_t = 0
HardInstBlock_t = 1
Else:
HardInstBlock_t = 0


If InstUnavailable_t = 0 and InstAvailable_t = 1:
InstSelSource_t = 2


If InstUnavailable_t = 1 and ProxyInstAvailable_t = 0 and InstitutionalDegradeMode in {"soft_neutral_then_stack_relax", "proxy_substitute_then_stack_relax"}:
EffectiveMinCategoryVotes_t = max(MinCategoryVotes - 1, MinCategoryVotesFloor)
Else:
EffectiveMinCategoryVotes_t = MinCategoryVotes


Normalization
z(x_t) = (x_t - mean(x)) / (stdev(x) + eps)

Category pass logic and signal stack
Convert selected category signals into pass/fail confirmation states before alpha, execution, and risk routing.


If InstSelSource_t = 2:
InstPass_t = 1 if DirMap(InstSel_t) = Dir_t and abs(z(InstSel_t)) >= thInst else 0
If InstSelSource_t = 1:
InstPass_t = 1 if DirMap(InstSel_t) = Dir_t and abs(z(InstSel_t)) >= thInstProxy else 0
If InstSelSource_t = 0:
InstPass_t = 0


TrendPass_t = 1 if DirMap(TrendSel_t) = Dir_t and abs(z(TrendSel_t)) >= thTrend else 0
MomPass_t = 1 if DirMap(MomSel_t) = Dir_t and abs(z(MomSel_t)) >= thMom else 0
VolPass_t = 1 if DirMap(VolSel_t) = Dir_t and abs(z(VolSel_t)) >= thVol else 0
VolaPass_t = 1 if RegimeMap(VolaSel_t) = 1 else 0


SignalStackScore_t = InstPass_t + TrendPass_t + MomPass_t + VolPass_t + VolaPass_t
SignalStackGate_t = 1 if HardInstBlock_t = 0 and SignalStackScore_t >= EffectiveMinCategoryVotes_t else 0


Hard location gate
LocationScore_t = I(PivotDist_t <= thPivot) + I(SRDist_t <= thSR) + I(FibDist_t <= thFib) + I(SDScore_t >= thSD) + I(OBScore_t >= thOB) + I(FVGScore_t >= thFVG) + I(SweepScore_t >= thSweep) + I(Dir_t * WyckoffScore_t >= thWyckoff)
LocationPass_t = 1 if LocationScore_t >= MinLocationVotes else 0

Vectors

bid_t,
ask_t,

DOMBid_t^(K),
DOMAsk_t^(K),
DOMTot_t^(K),
DOMSkew_t^(K),
DOMPressure_t^(K),
BuyFlow_[t-h,t],
SellFlow_[t-h,t],
NetFlow_[t-h,t],
FlowImb_[t-h,t],
SignedFlow_[t-h,t],
CVD_t,
DeltaCVD_t,

Heads and decision rules
PreFilter_t = 1 if SignalStackGate_t = 1 and LocationPass_t = 1 else 0


alphaRaw_t = wAlpha^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t
execRaw_t = 1 / (1 + exp(-wExec^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t))
risk_t = wRisk^T * FinalIntegratedStateVector_t


alpha_t = PreFilter_t * alphaRaw_t
exec_t = PreFilter_t * execRaw_t


ExecPass_t = 1 if VPIN_t < thetaVPIN and Resil_t > thetaResil and SpreadShock_t < thetaSpreadShock and abs(Slippage_t) < thetaSlippage and DepthFade_t < thetaDepthFade else 0
RiskPass_t = 1 if risk_t < thetaRisk else 0


TradeGate_t = 1 if PreFilter_t = 1 and alphaRaw_t > thetaAlpha and ExecPass_t = 1 and RiskPass_t = 1 else 0


size_t = sizeMax * f(alphaRaw_t) * g(risk_t) * h(execRaw_t)


Implementation rules
Compute all raw formulas first, then normalize, then run category selection, then run availability and degrade logic, then run category pass logic, then run SignalStackGate_t and LocationPass_t, then assemble the final vector, then evaluate alpha, execution, risk, and TradeGate_t.
Do not merge DOM, Order Flow, OBI, and OFI into one raw variable.
Do not discard non-selected category signals; store them in RawSignalBank_t.
Allow config to switch category selection between fixed and dynamic modes.
Allow config to switch Institutional selection between anti-echo subfamily mode and direct full-category mode.
Allow config to switch Institutional degrade mode between "proxy_substitute", "proxy_substitute_then_stack_relax", "soft_neutral_then_stack_relax", and "hard_block".
Allow config to map any candidate to any category only if explicitly configured; otherwise use the default category membership above.
For FX/XAUUSD, use venue-aware aggregation for DOM, OBI, order flow, and internalisation proxies.
For futures, equities, and crypto, use direct centralized-book logic when available.
Keep Market/Institutional Structures always-on in FinalIntegratedStateVector_t even though the selector only chooses one active signal from each of Institutional, Trend, Momentum, Volume, and Volatility.
When one Institutional signal is missing, skip only that invalid signal and rescore remaining direct Institutional candidates.
When one Institutional subfamily is missing, keep Institutional selection active from remaining direct subfamilies.
When the whole Institutional category is unavailable:

Use direct proxy substitution if valid proxy Institutional candidates exist and degrade mode allows it.

Else use stack-relax if degrade mode allows it by reducing EffectiveMinCategoryVotes_t by one, floored by MinCategoryVotesFloor.

Else hard block the trade if degrade mode = "hard_block".
Never fabricate DOM, OBI, OFI, signed-flow, or CVD values from candle data when those observables are unavailable.
Preserve every formula above exactly, including RawSignalBank_t, selector logic, availability logic, degrade logic, pass logic, hard location gate, and final vector assembly.


Implement the full RawSignalBank_t, category selector, Institutional fallback/degrade logic, category pass stack, hard location gate, and FinalIntegratedStateVector_t exactly as specified above.

Context: For FOREX and XAUUSD, assume OTC venue fragmentation. Spot FX and most FX derivatives are OTC, decentralized, fragmented across venues, and much customer flow is internalised rather than fully visible to the broader market. BIS describes FX as OTC, decentralized, fragmented, and increasingly internalised, while LBMA describes the London gold market as a wholesale OTC market and publishes trade data to improve transparency rather than offering a single consolidated public order book. U.S. ATS and off-exchange transparency is delayed, not real-time. Use Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov style OFI and depth-impact structure. SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\] FlowImb\_\[t-h,t\] = (BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] - SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\]) / (BuyFlow\_\[t-h,t\] + SellFlow\_\[t-h,t\] + eps) SignedFlow\_\[t-h,t\] = sum\_{i in \[t-h,t\]} eps\_i \* vol\_i CVD\_t = CVD\_{t-1} + sum\_{i in (t-dt,t\]} eps\_i \* vol\_i DeltaCVD\_t = CVD\_t - CVD\_{t-1} 2.3 Order Book Imbalance, explicit OBI OBI\_t^(1) = (bidSize\_t - askSize\_t) / (bidSize\_t + askSize\_t + eps) OBI\_t^(K) = (sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* B\_{k,t} - sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* A\_{k,t}) / (sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* B\_{k,t} + sum\_{k=1..K} w\_k \* A\_{k,t} + eps) If OTC venue aggregated: OBIAgg\_t^(K) = sum\_{v=1..V} w\_v \* OBI\_{t,v}^(K) Keep the alias explicit: OBI\_t^(1) = DOMSkew\_t^(1) 2.4 Event-based OFI e\_n = I(P\_n^B >= P\_{n-1}^B) \* q\_n^B - I(P\_n^B <= P\_{n-1}^B) \* q\_{n-1}^B - I(P\_n^A <= P\_{n-1}^A) \* q\_n^A + I(P\_n^A >= P\_{n-1}^A) \* q\_{n-1}^A OFI\_t = sum\_{n in W\_t} e\_n DeltaMid\_t = beta\_t \* OFI\_t + err\_t 2.5 Rolling impact coefficients beta\_t = argmin\_beta sum\_{u=t-L+1..t} omega\_u \* (DeltaMid\_u - beta \* OFI\_u)^2 Qsign\_u = sum\_{i in u} eps\_i \* vol\_i lambda\_t = argmin\_lambda sum\_{u=t-L+1..t} omega\_u \* (DeltaMid\_u - lambda \* Qsign\_u)^2 Alternative concave-size impact form: DeltaMid\_u = lambda\_t \* sign(Q\_u) \* abs(Q\_u)^psi + eta\_u 0 < psi <= 1 2.6 Toxicity filter For bucket size Vstar: Vplus\_b = buy volume in bucket b Vminus\_b = sell volume in bucket b ImbBucket\_b = abs(Vplus\_b - Vminus\_b) / Vstar VPIN\_t = (1 / N) \* sum\_{b=t-N+1..t} ImbBucket\_b 2.7 Absorption, replenishment, resiliency AbsPlus\_t = VaggrPlus\_{W\_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid\_{W\_t}) / dp) AbsMinus\_t = VaggrMinus\_{W\_t} / (1 + abs(DeltaMid\_{W\_t}) / dp) ReplBid\_t = (DepthBid\_post - Yes — but with one critical correction.


The better design is not “strategies own signal assembly first.”
The better design is:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners -> Confluence/Canonical Signal Bank -> Category Selector + degrade logic -> Strategy layer -> Strategy-conditioned state assembly -> Router -> Policies/Risk -> Execution


So the answer is:


Yes, strategy should come before the final trade decision.

No, strategy should not be the owner of the full raw signal inventory or the canonical category-selection engine.


That ownership split matters a lot. 🚨


My verdict

Signals/Snapshots/Scanners -> Autochartist/Confluences -> Category Selector -> Strategy -> Institutional State Vector -> Router -> Risk/Policies -> Execution


I would change it to:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners -> MarketScannerHub.mqh -> Confluence.mqh -> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh -> CategorySelector.mqh -> Strategy(staged strategy gate) -> StrategyHypothesis/StrategyContext -> Router.mqh -> Policies.mqh/RiskEngine.mqh -> Execution.mqh


Or, if you want to preserve your named flow more closely:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners -> Autochartist/Confluences -> Institutional Raw Signal Bank -> Category Selector -> Strategy -> Strategy-conditioned Final Vector -> Router -> Risk/Policies -> Execution


That is the cleanest architecture.


Why I would not let Strategies assemble the canonical raw inventory


Because that creates three problems immediately:


1) It breaks single ownership of truth


DOM, OFI, OBI, signed flow, impact, and degrade logic should be computed once in a canonical place. Cont, Kukanov, and Stoikov show OFI is a primary short-horizon explanatory variable and its impact is tied to depth, so you do not want five strategies each recomputing slightly different versions of the same thing. OUP Academic+1


2) It is especially dangerous in FX/XAUUSD


FX is decentralized, fragmented, and heavily internalised, with much customer flow invisible to the broader market. LBMA’s own material describes London gold as an OTC bilateral market and its trade data as an aggregation layer to improve transparency, not a real-time consolidated book. That means your Institutional layer already needs explicit availability, coverage, and degrade logic. Strategies should consume that canonical degrade-aware state, not reinvent it. Bank for International Settlements+2LBMA+2


3) It is awkward in MQL5 event ownership


In MT5, each EA has only one timer, and BookEvent subscriptions are broadcast within the chart. That strongly argues for central orchestration of scan cadence and book subscriptions, not strategy-local event plumbing. Otherwise you get duplicated subscriptions, conflicting freshness, and nasty cross-module side effects. MQL5+2MQL5+2


So the blunt answer is: strategy should not be the ministry that manufactures the market state.


What strategy should do instead


Strategy should turn canonical signals into a trade hypothesis.


That is the right place to put “turn signals into strategies first.”


Not:
raw signals -> strategy builds everything -> final vector


But:
raw signals -> canonical category-selected state -> strategy interprets state -> strategy emits hypothesis -> final vector includes that hypothesis


That gives you clean boundaries.


The best split


Use two levels of state.


1) Canonical market state


Owned outside strategies.


This includes:


RawSignalBank_t

Institutional availability and degrade state

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

SignalStackGate_t

LocationPass_t

BaseContextVector_t

StructureVector_t

CoverageContextVector_t

optional AuxContextVector_t


This is the market’s truth.


2) Strategy hypothesis state


Owned by strategies.


This includes:


strategy_id

setup_type

intended direction

entry model

POI or location anchor

required structure mask

required category confirmations

invalidation model

target model

urgency / execution style

confidence or quality score

strategy-specific veto reasons


This is the strategy’s interpretation of the market truth.


That separation is what you want.


So should strategies come before final vector assembly?


Yes, but only in this sense:


Strategies should run before the final trade-decision vector that the router and risk engine consume.


They should not run before canonical raw signal assembly.


The clean sequence is:


Build canonical raw state

Select one signal per category

Build category pass states

Run hard signal-stack gate

Run hard location gate

Run strategies on top of that

Produce strategy hypotheses

Assemble final strategy-conditioned vector

Route

Risk/policy veto

Execution


That is the more correct ordering.


What I would change in your current chain


Your current chain says:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners -> Autochartist/Confluences -> Category Selector -> Strategy -> Institutional State Vector -> Router


I would invert the InstitutionalStateVector position.


Use this instead:


CA_Trading_System_EA.mq5
-> Signals/Snapshots/Scanners
-> MarketScannerHub.mqh
-> AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh
-> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
-> CategorySelector.mqh
-> Strategy(staged strategy gate)
-> StrategyRegistry.mqh / StrategyBase.mqh / StrategyCommon.mqh
-> Router.mqh
-> Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh
-> Execution.mqh
-> PositionMgmt.mqh / State.mqh / Config.mqh


That matches your ownership boundaries much better.


Why this is better


Canonical state first


This gives all strategies the same:


freshness

availability

degrade mode

anti-echo category selection

location state

structure context


So strategy selection becomes fair and comparable.


Strategy second


Now each strategy answers:
“Given the same market truth, do I have a valid setup here?”


That is how you avoid strategies secretly scoring themselves off different facts.


Final vector after strategy


Now the router and risk engine do not just see market state.
They see:


market state

selected category state

location pass

strategy intent

strategy-specific execution posture

strategy-specific risk template


That is materially better than letting router operate on a purely market-only vector.


The strongest architecture I’d recommend


Use this exact conceptual chain:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners
-> Confluence.mqh
-> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
-> CategorySelector.mqh
-> SignalStackGate_t
-> LocationPass_t
-> Strategy layer
-> StrategyHypothesisBank_t
-> Strategy arbitration / StrategyRegistry
-> FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t
-> Router
-> Policies / RiskEngine
-> Execution


That is the one I would build.


How to turn signals into strategies first, correctly


Do not let strategies compute canonical signals.
Let them map canonical state into strategy templates.


Each strategy should consume:


BaseContextVector_t

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

StructureVector_t

CoverageContextVector_t

raw fallback access for read-only diagnostics if needed


Each strategy should emit something like:


StrategyHypothesis_t =


strategy_id

armed_t

dir_t

setup_class

poi_type

poi_lo

poi_hi

location_pass_t

stack_required_votes_t

stack_actual_votes_t

exec_style_t

stop_model_t

tp_model_t

rr_min_t

alpha_local_t

risk_local_t

invalidation_reason

degrade_acceptance_t


Then Router chooses from hypotheses, not from raw indicators.


That is the institutional-grade move.


What the staged strategy gate should do


Your strategy layer should not be one giant boolean.


It should be staged like this:


Regime gate
Does this strategy belong in the current regime?

Location gate
Is price at a valid structural location for this strategy?

Liquidity event gate
Did a sweep, grab, displacement, reclaim, or auction rejection occur?

Category confirmation gate
Do the selected Trend, Momentum, Volume, Volatility, and Institutional signals meet the strategy’s required pattern?

Microstructure gate
If Institutional is available, does the direct or proxy Institutional state support the trade?

Execution gate
Is spread, resiliency, slippage, and depth acceptable?

Risk gate
Does the strategy still pass policy and portfolio constraints?


That is how signals become strategies without turning the codebase into spaghetti wearing a tie.


My concrete suggestion for your EA


I would introduce one extra transport object between Strategy and Router:


StrategyHypothesisBank.mqh or StrategyContext.mqh


And I would move InstitutionalStateVector.mqh before Strategy.


So the live chain becomes:


Signals/Snapshots/Scanners
-> AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh
-> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
-> CategorySelector.mqh
-> StrategyHypothesisBank.mqh
-> StrategyRegistry.mqh
-> Router.mqh
-> Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh
-> Execution.mqh


Where:


InstitutionalStateVector.mqh owns canonical state

CategorySelector.mqh owns anti-echo and degrade-aware selection

Strategy files own interpretation and setup logic

Router owns pick

Policies/Risk own veto

Execution owns sending


That is the clean line.


Final answer


So, yes: turning signals into strategies before the final trade vector is the right direction.


But only if you mean:
canonical state first, strategy interpretation second, final strategy-conditioned vector third.


Not:
strategy files assemble the canonical raw inventory.


The best formulation is:


raw market state -> selected category state -> strategy hypotheses -> final integrated trade state


That is the architecture I would recommend for your EA.
